missing_prerequisites.message: mobile/app.json must include a real UUID-shaped extra.eas.projectId before release sign-off run mode.
EXPO_TOKEN must be present for non-interactive EAS release metadata checks.
ASC_APPLE_ID and EXPO_APPLE_APP_SPECIFIC_PASSWORD must both be present for Apple submission readiness.
APP_STORE_CONNECT_ISSUER_ID or ASC_ISSUER_ID must be present when TestFlight evidence is required.
APP_STORE_CONNECT_KEY_ID or ASC_KEY_ID must be present when TestFlight evidence is required.
APP_STORE_CONNECT_PRIVATE_KEY / ASC_PRIVATE_KEY or a *_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH value must be present when TestFlight evidence is required.
APP_PHYSICAL_DEVICE_ID or APP_ANDROID_DEVICE_SERIAL must identify the trusted Android physical device.
No authorized Android physical device is visible to adb.
APP_PUSH_DELIVERY_EXPO_PUSH_TOKEN must be present before sending provider push delivery evidence.
APP_SENTRY_ORG or SENTRY_ORG must be present before querying native crash runtime evidence.
APP_SENTRY_PROJECT or SENTRY_PROJECT must be present before querying native crash runtime evidence.
APP_SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN or SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN must be present before querying native crash runtime evidence.
APP_NATIVE_CRASH_SENTRY_EVENT_ID or SENTRY_EVENT_ID must identify the controlled native crash event.
APP_TELEMETRY_RUNTIME_API_BASE_URL must point to the non-local release API before telemetry runtime evidence.
DATABASE_URL must point to the release / production PostgreSQL target for DB parity evidence.

resolution_hints.message: mobile/app.json must include a real UUID-shaped extra.eas.projectId before release sign-off run mode.
resolution_hints.action: Bind mobile/app.json to the real Expo project id before external release sign-off.
